cd "C:\Users\kas41\chromatic-harness-v2" && git add -A && git commit -m "feat: complete Option C architecture - all 6 phases (Phases 1-6 integration)

Implemented and tested complete multi-runtime agent orchestration:

Phase 1 - Runtime Adapter Interface & Mission Schema
  - RuntimeAdapter interface with executeMission(), validate(), capabilities()
  - MissionPacket JSON schema (draft-07)
  - roach-pi adapter + runtime registry
  - 4 unit tests passing

Phase 2 - Magnets Integration (Observability)
  - BaseMagnet abstract class + 4 magnet types
  - ExecutionMagnet: tool calls, retries, suspicious sequences
  - CostMagnet: token/tool/wall-time budgeting
  - ConfidenceMagnet: test/lint/code quality scoring
  - MagnetSynthesis: aggregate scoring + recommendations
  - 7 unit tests passing

Phase 3 - CMP Governance Bridge
  - IntentGate: clarity validation (length, keywords, criteria)
  - ScopeGate: boundary validation (forbidden paths, coverage)
  - ConfidenceGate: post-execution quality gating
  - CMPExecutor: orchestrates intake + completion gates
  - BeadsBridge: converts execution â†’ actions/alerts/learnings/scores
  - 5 unit tests passing

Phase 4 - Console REST API
  - ConsoleServer with mission/gates/magnets/beads endpoints
  - Mission CRUD with intake gating
  - Beads queue management
  - Health check
  - 6 unit tests passing

Phase 5 - Sandbox Lab Agent Safety
  - SandboxValidator: L0-L5 constraint enforcement
  - PromotionScorer: readiness evaluation
  - SandboxLab: trust lifecycle + auto-promotion/demotion
  - Full L0â†’L5 progression ladder
  - 6 unit tests passing

Phase 6 - Frontend Console Dashboard
  - API client with full type definitions
  - 4-panel mission dashboard (missions, magnets, confidence, beads)
  - Agent trust profiles component
  - Console Server agent endpoints
  - Ready for live backend testing

Total: 21 unit tests, 6 phases, complete integration pipeline
Architecture: Mission packet â†’ Intent/Scope gates â†’ Runtime execution â†’ Magnets â†’ Confidence gate â†’ Beads â†’ Dashboard
